title: Sammy Stitches X M A S Boutique Hooked Worn
description: SammyStitchesUK & M.A.S-Boutique present a vibrant springtime collaboration at Brighton Fringe, blending handmade crochet artistry with boutique fashion flair. Samantha of SammyStitchesUK showcases her hooked crochet animals — from cheeky frogs and curious cats to bright, blooming flowers - alongside colourful spring wear crafted in wool and magical gifts designed to delight. Each piece is lovingly made, celebrating the joy of yarn, hooks, and imagination. Adding a stylish twist, M.A.S-Boutique unveils their brand-new fashion line, bringing elegance and contemporary design to the showcase. Together, this relaxed, family-friendly event invites audiences to explore one-of-a-kind gifts, playful companions, and fresh seasonal style under one roof. It is a joyful celebration of creativity, community, and craft, perfect for Brighton Fringe visitors seeking something original, heartfelt, and truly unique. Discover handmade treasures and boutique fashion in a welcoming space
